title: Banding Together: Energy Experts Share Lessons Learned from Heat Pump Projects with the Alaska Energy Training Group
summary: Banding Together: Energy Experts Share Lessons Learned from Heat Pump Projects with the Alaska Energy Training Group Providing a platform to discuss what works and what doesn’t in energy projects throughout the state is critical to accelerate the pace of change and the success of future clean energy initiatives. As heat pump projects expand in Alaska, the Alaska Energy Training Group met to share best practices and training opportunities for heat pumps in cold climates. Heat pump projects are growing rapidly throughout Alaska, with incentives in the form of tax credits and upcoming rebates through Alaska Housing Finance Corporation (AHFC) and grant programs set to help install over 7...

title: BSNC Welcomes Gloria Ann Karmun as New Board Director
summary: BSNC is pleased to announce the election of shareholder Gloria Ann Karmun to the Board of Directors. Karmun is a resident of Nome, Alaska.
